purpose: Define the oral-grade Block 3 champion method contract beyond metric patching: business-evolution atoms, target-isolated generative laws, auditable calibration, external generalization, and strict claim gates.
claim_boundary: This is a method contract and audit rubric, not evidence that the champion method has passed.
Coverage repair is not point-forecast improvement unless paired point metrics also pass.
Source/text/EDGAR may be promoted only as event-state/regime evidence after strict row-key counterfactual and paired-benefit gates pass.
A NeurIPS oral-grade claim requires business-atom validity, point accuracy, calibrated reliability, width/sharpness control, external transfer, and reproducibility to pass together.

main_method_spine.name: TESF auditable event-state forecaster
main_method_spine.plain_language_goal: Learn how company financing state evolves, not just attach source labels to rows.
factorization: hard target-isolated observation and generative processes for binary funding occurrence, heavy-tail funding severity, and zero-inflated investor counts
source/text/EDGAR as sparse regime and event-memory evidence with no-read fallback
post-hoc auditable conformal/calibration protocol for row-keyed reliability
anti_patterns: promoting a source residual multiplier after paired-benefit failure
claiming coverage success without width/sharpness accounting
using source/text labels as a shortcut for business-state learning
treating public-pack forecasting completion as proof of Block 3 target-geometry transfer
counting diagnostic rows as formal temporal benchmark evidence

gate_groups.why_it_matters: The method must represent business-state evolution and source availability before any result can be interpreted mechanistically.
Source must help through calibrated event-state/regime reading, not by a brittle residual multiplier.
A champion method must beat strong non-mainline forecasters on paired point metrics, not only produce valid intervals.
Reliability must pass weak-cell audits while controlling interval width so the solution is not just over-wide.
The method must not be only a Block 3 artifact; it must survive source-free public forecasting and later target-geometry transfer tests.
Top-conference ideas are useful only after they are converted into implemented, audited local mechanisms.

candidate_strategy_rank.action: Use the auditable conformal protocol to wrap the strongest point forecasters and separate point-skill proof from reliability proof.
Add training-time distributional/quantile tail objectives for funding h14/h30 hard cells; evaluate tail MAE, quantile loss, coverage, and width.
Train or calibrate hard regions explicitly while enforcing no easy-cell collapse.
Redesign source/text as sparse event memory with read confidence, recency, novelty, and no-read fallback; do not promote until read-gate passes.
Distill specialist champions into one deployable student without runtime ensembling or selector leakage.
